title: 函館スプリントSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first trial of her training—the
Hakodate Sprint Stakes, and Curren Chan is as
cute as ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Believing she'll learn something during this race,
she's eager for the race to begin!
